title: danthonia scabra
intro: Danthonia scabra, also known as rough bluegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Danthonia scabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, soothe irritated skin, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being applied topically to the skin, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
